summaries.summary: Implemented project-scoped Codex CLI capsule boot setup with read-only session hook, optional local ION MCP read/status tools, and explicit post receipt helper.
Implemented Codex CLI model moves and Mini auto-post for dual chat
Implemented public cockpit login with signed sessions, permission tokens, and Google OAuth hooks
Updated cockpit login password and pre-allowed crinkedart Google account
Rebuilt dual Codex chat into JOC-style cockpit workbench with command rail and context drawers
Added Codex return/proof hydration into the Codex Capsule chat timeline.
Added transparent per-turn trace and agent broker visibility to Codex Capsule chat.
Corrected Codex chat UI language and composer flow after operator confusion.
Extracted active Codex Chat app shell into dedicated UI renderer module.
Removed obsolete in-file Codex chat HTML/CSS renderer blocks after UI extraction.
Implemented Codex Chat response carrier: respond-only chat turns can use Codex CLI final messages under the Capsule/skill/native-lens engine, with fallback, trace events, artifacts
Enabled Codex Chat response carrier in the user service and verified authenticated cockpit chat turn captured a real GPT-5.5 Codex final message with no unexpected worktree drift.
Fixed cockpit chat pending-state UX: optimistic user bubble, Codex loading bubble, textarea clear, disabled submit controls, duplicate-submit guard, JSON fetch response handling, a
Installed Playwright package and added opt-in live cockpit browser smoke proving chat submit clears immediately, shows pending Codex response state, blocks duplicate submit, and ca
Planned the next Codex Capsule Chat rewrite around JOC shell regions, Victus Contextual Matryoshka, Echo Forge evented chat traces, protocol manifest routing, and smart context vis
Added and passed live Playwright JOC shell smoke for Codex Chat: shell regions, top page switch, left drawer, right inspector, context memory page, timeline filter, and composer re
Implemented selected-message and route graph interaction for Codex Chat: chat turns, memory segments, and route edges are selectable; selected-node panel updates; connected context
Improved Codex Chat route graph usability: edge-type filters, route row metadata, selected node turn/source fields, and live browser coverage for compressed route filtering.
Implemented source-ref drilldown and compact selected-turn trace linking in Codex Chat: source refs and carrier phase events are selectable, update the selected-node panel, and hig
Persisted Codex Chat context inspector selection across reloads: memory, route, source, and trace selections now store in browser state/hash and restore before default selection; l
Reviewed AI Assistant Work route compiler next packet and mapped candidate routes to active Codex chat skills, native lenses, Custom GPT/MCP/product lanes, and next compiler implem
Implemented candidate-only Assistant Work route compiler and wired route metadata into Codex chat engine, queued objectives, turn traces, UI model drawers, and right inspector.
Documented Phase 4 product reconciliation matrix across Codex Capsule Chat, Action Gateway, MCP Action, data-zip Custom GPT product, local cockpit, and full ION pipeline.
Added candidate Assistant Work route metadata to Action Gateway validate-only responses; held MCP route tool for explicit tool-policy/schema gate.
Planned candidate-domain operation ladder for assistant-work surfaces: candidate domains/agents/templates/routes may operate under containment for classification, proof shaping, ro
Published feature/codex-capsule-chat-active-root with active-root Codex Capsule Chat, Mini/Capsule context system, chat engine, response carrier, JOC-style shell modules, model mov
Recovered lost Codex CLI terminal session and verified final pushed branch state
Exposed bounded codex-runner reconcile and capsule chat MCP bridge tools with focused tests.
Implemented bounded Codex worker live telemetry surface with safe preview gating and tests.
Built Custom GPT carrier package v2.6.7 candidate with Codex Capsule/queue relay docs, dAimon doctrine updates, and validated zip/test receipt.
dAimon Cloud Run proof update committed and pushed to GitHub on main at 33f29ed; repo is clean. Remaining gate is Agent Builder MongoDB MCP trace export.
dAimon final live proof gate passed: deployed Vertex AI Agent Engine proof agent called Cloud Run find_continuity_objects, Cloud Run queried live MongoDB-backed receipt-cleared sta
Added parent-scope Codex startup bridge so chats launched from /home/sev/ION - Production load the active ION Codex Solo capsule context.
Audited and hardened Codex Solo startup continuity: added parent bridge regression coverage and startup recency snapshot so truncated boot context preserves latest capsule rows.
Created Codex Carrier Limits as a first-class ION context domain with protocol, registry, current limits snapshot, route integration, and focused regression coverage.
Corrected Custom GPT Capsule System v0.4 intake after root workpackets lane miss: found zip in `ION_CODEX FULL/workpackets`, verified sha256, copied to ION inbox, staged candidate
